Two C3H6N6 (melamine) samples, each with a diameter
of 41.29 mm, were back-to-back mounted. The 14N
nuclei number of C3H6N6#I was 9.86 +- 0.03 E19, and
glued on the center of the shield for monitoring the
neutron fluence. The diameter of the 238U3O8 sample is
45.0 mm, and the nuclei number of 238U was 2.081 +-
EJ309 was used to measure the neutron spectrum
by the recoil proton spectroscopy method.
The 238U3O8#II sample with 43.0 mm in diameter
and 1.898 +- 0.018 E19 in nuclei number (NU) of 238U
was mounted on the sample position 2# of the sample
changer at the cathode. It was used to measure the
average neutron fluence through the solid samples.
